name: Eva Reynes
short_description: Play as a detective fighting to banish the ghosts of her past, on a journey of revenge, rediscovery, and self-redemption.
detailed_description:
Features:



- Walk in the footsteps of the legendary Eva Reynes and unveil the truth in this journey filled with mystery, heartbreak, sarcasm and premium whisky.

- Unique personalities, complex and unpredictable plots, and a captivating story.

- Investigate crime scenes, search for clues, make deductions and find out the truth.

- Engage in timed discourse battles: shake up your opponent, point out contradictions using the evidence you've found, or use deception and play dirty.

- Manage and develop skills/traits such as Personality, Perception and Discourse.

- Original content and artwork.

- Several bad endings, one normal ending and one true ending.
